description: You are an agricultural robotics engineer testing path-planning algorithms for a crop-weeding robot. Enable object recognition for the `CROP_CAMERA` on the `AGRI_BOT` by adding and configuring a Recognition node with a `maxRange` of 5.0 meters and a `frameColor` of 1 0.5 0. Ensure the three weed objects (`WEED_1`, `WEED_2`, and `WEED_3`) are detectable by setting their `recognitionColors` to 0.8 0.2 0.2. Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/agri_smart_camera.wbt.
